overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic samurai game showing an armored warrior exploring a misty Japanese temple garden with blooming cherry blossoms, crossing a traditional red bridge, and approaching fire-damaged ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: lily pond garden with stone pathways and mossy rocks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path beside the lily pond toward the traditional temple buildings

entered.detail: calm water surface covered with green lily pads
irregular stone tiles forming a walking path
large boulders covered in green moss flanking the path
pink flowering trees in full bloom creating a canopy
traditional Japanese temple with curved dark roof and wooden walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a tranquil Japanese garden with a lily pond at center. The character walks along a stone pathway flanked by mossy rocks, approaching a traditional wooden temple in the distance. Pink cherry blossom trees frame the misty background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden temple exterior with stairs and railings

events.description: approaching the wooden temple building with ornate stairs and railings

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden temple structure along the stone path, passing the stairs and wooden deck

entered.detail: wooden stairs with brass finials leading up to the temple deck
elevated wooden platform with traditional railings
ornate wooden handrail with brass decorations

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the side of the wooden temple, passing the stairs and railings. The temple structure now dominates the right side while the stone path continues forward. The lily pond disappears from view as the character progresses toward the red bridge.

events.description: stepping onto the red wooden bridge crossing over the lily pond
pausing on the bridge to look around at the temple grounds and destroyed buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the red wooden bridge and pausing midway to survey the surroundings including the destroyed building

entered.detail: traditional arched wooden bridge painted red with black metal finials
fire-damaged temple structure with collapsed roof and charred beams

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the distinctive red wooden bridge, moving from the garden toward the main temple. Halfway across, the character pauses to look around, revealing a destroyed burned building to the left. The traditional temple stands ahead while the lily pond flows beneath.

scene_state.functional_zone: fire-damaged temple ruins with stone pathways

events.description: leaving the bridge and entering the area with burned and collapsed buildings
moving deeper into the misty courtyard surrounded by destroyed structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the burned ruins and misty courtyard, examining the damaged architecture and debris

entered.detail: piles of charred wooden beams and collapsed roof sections
traditional stone lantern in the center of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge, the character enters a somber area of fire-damaged ruins. The destroyed wooden building dominates the left side with its collapsed roof and charred remains. The character walks through the misty courtyard past piles of burned debris, with a stone lantern visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tranquil Japanese garden that gradually transitions into a somber landscape of fire-damaged ruins. It begins on a stone pathway beside a lily pond, moving past mossy rocks and pink cherry blossom trees toward a distant wooden temple. As the character progresses, the camera shifts to follow them along the side of the temple structure, leaving the pond behind to approach a distinctive red wooden bridge. The scene then opens up as the character crosses the bridge, pausing to reveal a charred, destroyed building to the left before continuing toward the main temple. Finally, the camera moves away from the bridge and into a misty courtyard, passing collapsed roofs and piles of burned debris toward a distant stone lantern.
